steps: Contact RBC Investor Services to request refund of CAD 4,077.00 overpayment on BMO dividend for account 1401234567
Provide documentation showing CA-NO treaty rate of 15% applies, resulting in correct net payment of CAD 231,030.00
Submit formal reclaim with treaty certification if RBC requires additional withholding tax recovery process
Escalate to RBC's dividend department if initial contact does not resolve within 10 business days
